steps.t: The villagers can be found around the town of Lhan Tarren. You did not know many of these people personally, but they should be laid to rest below the…
Also among the dead in Lhan Tarren are Elder Riagán and Blodwen, two people that you considered friends in Trum Dreng. You should lay the Elder and Bl…
Guto is grieving at the head of Lhan Tarren. You should speak with Guto and offer him your deepest sympathies.
